summary: HTTP client for the OpenRouter chat completions API, implementing the Client interface with Bearer token auth

guarantees: Returns first choice content string on 200 OK; returns error on non-200, empty choices, or network failure

state: Holds apiKey, baseURL, and http.Client (no timeout configured — relies on context cancellation)

observations.text: openRouterRequest/Message/Response/Choice types defined here are also reused by ollama.go — they represent the shared OpenAI-compatible JSON schema
http.Client created with no Timeout — only context cancellation bounds the request; a hung server with no context deadline will block indefinitely
Error messages embed the HTTP status code and raw response body, giving callers full context on API failures without extra logging
